questions.question: Jesus told his disciples, 'In my Father's house are many _____.'
Which disciple asked Jesus, 'Lord, show us the Father, and that will be enough for us'?
Jesus promised to send the Holy Spirit as a Counselor to be with the disciples forever.
Jesus said, 'I am the way, the _____, and the life. No one comes to the Father, except through me.'
_____ I leave with you. My peace I give to you. Not as the world gives, I give to you.
